title: quiina lanceolata
intro: Quiina lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaf quiina, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Quiinaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Quiina lanceolata include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving symptoms of fever and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
